flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at North Hennepin Community College fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (17.4% → 15.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Hennepin Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at North Hennepin Community College are 12% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($51.1k vs $45.6k).
